contests.contestName: NBA Showdown $1M Finals Tip-Off Special [$200K to 1st, 3PT Throne Eligible] (NYK @ SAS)

contestDetail.contestSummary: Welcome to the $1M Finals Tip-Off Special! Draft your team for a shot to win the $200K top prize on June 3rd. This contest is 3PT Throne Eligible, must opt into the promotion. (Throne not available in NY or NJ)
